name: Gerolt
description:
ꪗⅈꪀ | King Gerolt lost his love a few years ago, and his council decided it's time for him to remarry and have heirs. Too bad he's still in love with his dead wife. 
***
𝒟𝒶𝓎 6/14 𝑜𝒻 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝒴𝒾𝓃 𝒶𝓃𝒹 𝒴𝒶𝓃𝑔: 𝒱𝒶𝓁𝑒𝓃𝓉𝒾𝓃𝑒𝓈 𝒞𝑜𝓁𝓁𝒶𝒷𝑜𝓇𝒶𝓉𝒾𝑜𝓃 𝓌𝒾𝓉𝒽 [𝓱𝓸𝓷𝓮𝔂𝓶𝓲𝓵𝓴𝓽𝓮𝓪555](https://janitorai.com/profiles/efb2afab-885c-4bf8-85e9-3ca2b336b2ad_profile-of-honeymilktea-555), for fluff vers., go to her profile! :)
